texto: Self-esteem is the switch in the circuit of your life that dims or brightness of your future. Bring it low and you don't shine your light
autor: raise it up and you brighten the corner where you are.
explicacao: Citação de raise it up and you brighten the corner where you are. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Self-esteem is the switch in the circuit of your life that dims or brightness of your future. Bri…” articula reflexao, israelmore-ayivor, esteem em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
